title: ICJ Orders Israel to Ensure Basic Needs for Gaza Population
detail: The International Court of Justice ruled that Israel must ensure basic needs of Gaza's population are met and must support UN relief efforts including UNRWA. The ruling came amid Israel's suspension of aid deliveries and humanitarian organizations from operating in Gaza.

title: IDF Closes Hostages and Missing Persons Headquarters
detail: The Israel Defense Forces formally shuttered its Hostages and Missing Persons Headquarters, 846 days after the October 7 Hamas attack. All 251 hostages taken that day have been accounted for, with the last hostage Ran Gvili recovered deceased on January 26, 2026.

title: Israeli Airstrikes Kill Four Palestinians on Eid al-Fitr; Fatah Leader and Police Among Dead
detail: Israeli airstrikes killed at least four Palestinians on March 22 as Eid al-Fitr celebrations began. A Fatah leader was killed in an aerial assault on the Sheikh Radwan neighborhood of northern Gaza City, with several others wounded. Separately, three Palestinian police officers were killed in a strike targeting their vehicle in the Nuseirat refugee camp in central Gaza. Al Jazeera reported 680 Palestinians had been killed since the October 2025 ceasefire took effect. West Bank settler violence was also reported concurrently, with cars smashed and fires set in multiple villages near Jenin and Nablus.
